steps.title: Spot the contrast between typical practice and exception
steps.content: The passage states Larlarb “typically custom fits the garments to each actor,” then describes what she did “for the film Sunshine”: had a factory reproduce standard sizes, “lacking a tailor-made quality.” The transition must signal a departure from her normal approach.

steps.title: Apply the transition word to the structure
steps.content: ”Nevertheless” is a contrast marker, the signal for an exception or reversal. “Thus” wrongly implies consequence; “Likewise” wrongly implies similarity; “Moreover” wrongly implies addition. That matches choice A — A is correct.
